description: Upgrade go-loop from mechanical verifier to a bounded autonomous coding runtime by adding pluggable build/critic/repair hooks, attempt ladder, machine-readable attempts, and tests proving a failing task can be repaired without user intervention.
acceptance: go-loop --execute can run build/critic/repair adapter commands across multiple attempts.
A failing fixture is repaired automatically and finishes done without user intervention.
Attempt evidence records build, verify, critic, repair, judge and strategy per attempt.

evidence.summary: Implemented pluggable Ralph-style executor adapter hooks: --build-command, --critic-command, --repair-command, --max-attempts; go-loop now runs bounded attempt ladder with build/verify/critic/repair/judge evidence and can repair a failing fixture without user intervention. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed; validate passed; git diff --check passed.
